memory_items.title: Use Read before Edit on existing files
memory_items.description: Failure: agent attempted Edit before Read; tool errored.
memory_items.content: When editing an existing file, always invoke Read first so the harness can track file state. Edit fails on un-Read files.

memory_items.title: Use Read before Edit on existing files.
memory_items.description: Same failure observed again — confirm Read-before-Edit rule.
memory_items.content: When editing an existing file, always invoke Read first so the harness tracks file state. Edit fails on un-Read files.

memory_items.title: Successful pattern: parallel subagent dispatch
memory_items.description: Success: dispatched 3 implementers in parallel, all returned DONE.
memory_items.content: When tasks are file-disjoint and Independent: true, dispatch all implementers in a single assistant message with multiple Agent tool calls.

memory_items.title: Add new section: edge-case taxonomy for cross-plugin delegation
memory_items.description: Would require a dedicated reference file (>500 token taxonomy).
memory_items.content: Comprehensive edge-case taxonomy for cross-plugin delegation including path-resolution, gate-bypass refusal, version-mismatch detection, and structured-seed-context passing. Best owned by a new references/cross-plugin-delegation.md file.
